# Knowdose

> Knowdose helps patients understand their prescriptions in seconds. Type or upload a medication and get a clear, plain-English explanation of what it is, how to take it, and what side effects to watch for.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Type or upload a prescription and get a friendly explanation.
- [Compare medications](/compare): Check how two or more medications interact, with safety tips.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch for support, privacy queries, or feedback.
- [Medical disclaimer](/medical-disclaimer): Knowdose is for education only and is not medical advice.
- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How we handle your data and your GDPR rights.
- [Terms & conditions](/terms): The terms that apply when using Knowdose.
